children.value: Show notifications report in Screen Time
Banners appear in the upper-right corner and go away automatically. Alerts stay on screen until dismissed.

Last login: Wed May 20 23:44:42 on console
lume@lumes-Virtual-Machine ~ % mkdir -p /tmp/matraix-macos-notification-preferences
lume@lumes-Virtual-Machine ~ % cat > /tmp/matraix-macos-notification-preferences/decision.json << 'EOF'
heredoc> {
heredoc>   "keep_notifications_on": true,
heredoc>   "app_reviewed": "Mail",
heredoc>   "reason": "Mail is essential for my work as a PM. I need to catch time-sensitive emails from stakeholders without constantly checking the inbox. Banner-style notifications are unobtrusive enough — they appear briefly and disappear on their own, so they don't break my focus too much. Keeping them on makes sense for a daily work machine."
heredoc> }
heredoc> EOF
lume@lumes-Virtual-Machine ~ % cat /tmp/matraix-macos-notification-preferences/decision.json
{
  "keep_notifications_on": true,
  "app_reviewed": "Mail",
  "reason": "Mail is essential for my work as a PM. I need to catch time-sensitive emails from stakeholders without constantly checking the inbox. Banner-style notifications are unobtrusive enough — they appear briefly and disappear on their own, so they don't break my focus too much. Keeping them on makes sense for a daily work machine."
}
